1	/**
2	 * Lesson Duplication Orchestrator
3	 *
4	 * Drives the duplication pipeline for a single LessonDuplications record:
5	 *  1. K2: Select up to 20 exercises from source lesson (via selectExercisesScaled)
6	 *  2. For each exercise, concurrently (max 3):
7	 *     a. Route to strategy (script or AI) → generates new exercise content
8	 *     b. Run structural validator on the generated content
9	 *     c. If structural passes AND strategy != 'script', run semantic validator
10	 *     d. On any failure, append a failure entry to the LessonDuplications record
11	 *  3. After all exercises settle: set status=succeeded (0 failures) or needs_review (>0 failures)
12	 *
13	 * Failures are streamed live — each failure is written to the DB immediately
14	 * via payload.update(), not accumulated in memory.
15	 */

40	// LLM twice (creative + deterministic). Gemini's per-minute quota is easily
41	// exceeded at higher concurrency, which triggered "rate limit exceeded"

43	// service has rate-limit backoff as a safety net, but serializing is the
44	// primary control. Bump this back up only after we've sized the quota AND

47	// any bump (current value preserved as literal `1`).

90	/**
91	 * Cap source-exercise block count to match the structural validator's
92	 * `TOO_MANY_SECTIONS` ceiling (5). Pure: returns a NEW exercise object with
93	 * a trimmed `content.blocks` array when needed, otherwise the original.
94	 *
95	 * Picks 5 representative blocks from the source via `selectSectionsScaled` —
96	 * the same scaling-random bucketing the lesson-level selector uses. Preserves
97	 * source order, so the variation reads like a natural shorter version of the
98	 * original rather than a random shuffle.
99	 *
100	 * Rationale: without this, a 10-block source always failed validation
101	 * (TOO_MANY_SECTIONS is a blocking failure → exercise dropped from output).
102	 * Admins doing deep variations on real lessons would silently lose any
103	 * exercise that exceeded the block cap.
104	 */
105	function trimSourceBlocksIfNeeded(exercise: ExerciseDoc): ExerciseDoc {
106	  const blocks = exercise.content?.blocks
107	  if (!Array.isArray(blocks) || blocks.length <= 5) return exercise
108	  const picked = selectSectionsScaled(blocks, 5)
109	  logger.info(
110	    { exerciseId: exercise.id, originalCount: blocks.length, trimmedTo: picked.length },
111	    'Source exercise has more than 5 blocks — trimming via scaling-random selector',
112	  )
113	  return {
114	    ...exercise,
115	    content: { ...exercise.content, blocks: picked },
116	  }
117	}

121	  switch (code) {
122	    case 'MISSING_QUESTION':
123	    case 'MISSING_HINT':
124	    case 'MISSING_SOLUTION':
125	    case 'MISSING_FULL_SOLUTION':
126	    case 'MISSING_CORRECT_OPTION':
127	    case 'MISSING_WRONG_OPTIONS':
128	    case 'INVALID_SVG':
129	    case 'PNG_FORBIDDEN':
130	    case 'TOO_MANY_SECTIONS':
131	    case 'INVALID_GEOMETRY_SPEC':
132	    case 'INVALID_AXIS_SPEC':
133	    case 'INVALID_GUIDED_EXPLANATION':
134	      return 'regenerate'

137	    case 'GENERATION_FAILED':

153	/**
154	 * Append a single failure/warning entry to the LessonDuplications record.
155	 *
156	 * The bucket name is chosen by the caller:
157	 *  - 'failures' = blocking; the exercise was dropped from the output lesson.
158	 *  - 'warnings' = non-blocking; the exercise was kept with TODO placeholders
159	 *    for the missing field. Admin polishes via the review screen.
160	 */
161	async function appendEntry(
162	  bucket: 'failures' | 'warnings',
163	  payload: Payload,
164	  duplicationId: string,
165	  exerciseRef: string,
166	  sectionIndex: number,
167	  code: string,
168	  message: string,
169	): Promise<void> {
170	  const action = suggestAction(code)
171	  try {
172	    const current = await payload.findByID({
173	      collection: 'lesson-duplications',
174	      id: duplicationId,
175	      depth: 0,
176	      overrideAccess: true,
177	    })
178	    await payload.update({
179	      collection: 'lesson-duplications',
180	      id: duplicationId,
181	      data: {
182	        [bucket]: [
183	          // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
184	          ...(((current as any)[bucket] as any[]) ?? []),
185	          {
186	            exerciseRef,
187	            sectionIndex,
188	            code,
189	            message,
190	            suggestedAction: action,
191	            resolved: false,
192	          },
193	        ],
194	      } as never,
195	      overrideAccess: true,
196	    })
197	  } catch (err) {
198	    logger.error(
199	      { err, duplicationId, exerciseRef, code, bucket },
200	      `Failed to append ${bucket} entry to LessonDuplications`,
201	    )
202	    // Don't rethrow — streaming failure should not abort the run
203	  }
204	}
